titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to mu'awiyah Ibn 'ammar
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to mu'awiyah Ibn 'ammar

segments: ه عن معاوية بن عمّار فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن صفوان بن يحيى؛ و محمّد بن أبي عمير جميعا عن معاوية بن عمّار الدّهنيّ الغنويّ الكوفيّ مولى بجيلة و يكنّى أبا القاسم‌.
arabic.text: ه عن معاوية بن عمّار فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن صفوان بن يحيى؛ و محمّد بن أبي عمير جميعا عن معاوية بن عمّار الدّهنيّ الغنويّ الكوفيّ مولى بجيلة و يكنّى أبا القاسم‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn 'Ammar has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Safwan ibn Yahya and Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr together, from Mu'awiyah ibn 'Ammar Al-Dahni Al-Ghanawi Al-Kufi, the freed servant (mawla) of Bujaylah, and he was known by the kunya Abu Al-Qasim.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Mu'awiyah ibn 'Ammar has been transmitted by me from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Safwan ibn Yahya and Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr together, from Mu'awiyah ibn 'Ammar Al-Dahni Al-Ghanawi Al-Kufi, the freed servant (mawla) of Bujaylah, and he was known by the kunya Abu Al-Qasim.
